query:
CREATE TABLE `documents` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`content` text,
	`fileUrl` varchar(500),
	`fileKey` varchar(500),
	`mimeType` varchar(100),
	`tags` varchar(500),
	`category` varchar(100),
	`isPublic` enum('private','team','public') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'private',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `documents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`message` text,
	`type` enum('task_update','ai_insight','document_shared','system') NOT NULL,
	`relatedTaskId` int,
	`relatedDocumentId` int,
	`isRead` enum('read','unread') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unread',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `productivityMetrics` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`date` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`tasksCompleted` int DEFAULT 0,
	`tasksCreated` int DEFAULT 0,
	`averagePriority` varchar(50),
	`completionRate` int DEFAULT 0,
	`documentsCreated` int DEFAULT 0,
	`aiInsightsGenerated` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `productivityMetrics_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `taskInsights` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`taskId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`insight` text NOT NULL,
	`insightType` enum('summary','suggestion','warning','optimization') NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `taskInsights_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `tasks` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` text NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`status` enum('todo','in_progress','completed','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'todo',
	`priority` enum('low','medium','high','urgent') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
	`category` varchar(100),
	`dueDate` timestamp,
	`aiSummary` text,
	`aiPriority` varchar(50),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tasks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
ALTER TABLE `documents` ADD CONSTRAINT `documents_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `notifications` ADD CONSTRAINT `notifications_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `notifications` ADD CONSTRAINT `notifications_relatedTaskId_tasks_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`relatedTaskId`) REFERENCES `tasks`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `notifications` ADD CONSTRAINT `notifications_relatedDocumentId_documents_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`relatedDocumentId`) REFERENCES `documents`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `productivityMetrics` ADD CONSTRAINT `productivityMetrics_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `taskInsights` ADD CONSTRAINT `taskInsights_taskId_tasks_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`taskId`) REFERENCES `tasks`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `taskInsights` ADD CONSTRAINT `taskInsights_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `tasks` ADD CONSTRAINT `tasks_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
